summary: Made a surgical seam pass by changing the opening scaffold so it no longer mirrors Chapter 10's timed entry and by tightening the overnight lab handoff into the next chapter.
edits: Reworked the opening paragraph to begin on the rookery itself instead of a matching 'By [time]' frame.
Moved the late-afternoon cue into the second paragraph to preserve timing without repeating the adjacent chapter's opening structure.
Added the recorder-on-dish-towel lab detail to align Chapter 9's exit with Chapter 10's opening image.
Added a brief no-sleep beat to support the immediate next-morning continuation in the bat lab.
